Findings.Evidence: Disabled user retains Global Administrator role assignment
Findings.RecommendedAction: Remove Global Administrator role assignment from disabled user alex.mercer@contoso.com
Findings.ConsultantNote: Confirm no pending IT tasks before removing role

Findings.Evidence: Disabled user holds active Privileged Role Administrator assignment — account is disabled
Findings.RecommendedAction: Remove Privileged Role Administrator assignment from disabled user sam.okafor@contoso.com immediately
Findings.ConsultantNote: Privileged role held by disabled user is a critical security gap

Findings.Evidence: Application owned exclusively by disabled user alex.mercer@contoso.com — no active owner remains
Findings.RecommendedAction: Assign active owner to Contoso Analytics API; remove disabled user alex.mercer@contoso.com as owner
Findings.ConsultantNote: App is effectively unmanaged — disabled sole owner creates governance gap

Findings.Evidence: Guest account holds User Administrator role — no sponsor metadata
Findings.RecommendedAction: Review guest privileged access; assign sponsor; consider role removal
Findings.ConsultantNote: Guest with privileged role requires explicit business justification

Findings.Evidence: Disabled user retains 3 app role assignments: Salesforce Admin, SAP HR Read, Workday Integrations
Findings.RecommendedAction: Revoke all app role assignments for disabled user morgan.chen@contoso.com
Findings.ConsultantNote: App role assignments for disabled users represent residual SaaS access risk

Findings.Evidence: Client secret expired 47 days ago (2026-04-13) — credential still attached to application
Findings.RecommendedAction: Remove expired credential from Legacy SSO Connector and rotate if integration still active
Findings.ConsultantNote: Expired credentials are a hygiene issue; confirm whether integration is still in use

Findings.Evidence: Disabled user retains membership in 4 groups including IT-Admins
Findings.RecommendedAction: Remove jordan.riley@contoso.com from all group memberships
Findings.ConsultantNote: Standard group cleanup for disabled user

Findings.Evidence: CA policy excludes 3 users and 2 groups from MFA requirement — exclusions require review
Findings.RecommendedAction: Review and reduce exclusions in policy; initiate access review for excluded identities
Findings.ConsultantNote: CA policy exclusions should be time-bound and reviewed quarterly

Findings.Evidence: CA exclusion group CA-MFA-Exclusion-VendorAccounts has 8 members — access review status unknown
Findings.RecommendedAction: Create access review for CA-MFA-Exclusion-VendorAccounts; validate all 8 members still require CA exclusion
Findings.ConsultantNote: CA exclusion groups with unverified review status expand the attack surface

Findings.RecommendedAction: Assign accountable owner to Reporting Daemon SP
Findings.ConsultantNote: Ownerless service principals are a governance gap

Findings.Evidence: Client secret expires in 14 days (2026-06-13) — renewal not confirmed
Findings.RecommendedAction: Rotate expiring client secret for DevOps Pipeline SP before 2026-06-13
Findings.ConsultantNote: Expiring secrets cause integration failures and may trigger emergency access patterns

Findings.Evidence: Guest account has no manager assigned and no department metadata — sponsor cannot be determined
Findings.RecommendedAction: Assign a sponsor (manager) and department to ext_contractor@northwind.com or initiate offboarding
Findings.ConsultantNote: Guest without sponsor metadata cannot be traced to a business owner

Findings.Evidence: Application has only 1 owner — single point of failure for ownership continuity
Findings.RecommendedAction: Add a second owner to Finance Reporting App to ensure ownership continuity
Findings.ConsultantNote: Single-owner apps are a governance risk if that owner leaves or is disabled

Findings.Evidence: Service principal has no owner assigned — accountability gap for this enterprise application
Findings.RecommendedAction: Assign accountable owner to Azure Backup Agent SP
Findings.ConsultantNote: Ownerless service principals with active permissions are ungoverned

Findings.Evidence: Guest last sign-in 210 days ago — no access review coverage
Findings.RecommendedAction: Initiate access review for stale guest ext_vendor@tailspin.com
Findings.ConsultantNote: Stale guest — review with business owner for continued need

Findings.Evidence: AuditLog.Read.All scope unavailable — IGA coverage assessment incomplete
Findings.RecommendedAction: Request AuditLog.Read.All and EntitlementManagement.Read.All for full IGA coverage
Findings.ConsultantNote: Coverage gap — not a finding against tenant configuration
